# Blitzllama Documentation

## Blitzllama Documentation

- [About Blitzllama](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/master.md)
- [Creating Surveys](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/quickstart-guides/creating-surveys.md)
- [Creating Quizzes](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/quickstart-guides/creating-quizzes.md)
- [Targeting Essentials](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/quickstart-guides/targeting-essentials.md)
- [Customization & Personalization](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/quickstart-guides/customization-and-personalization.md)
- [Extracting Insights from Surveys](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/quickstart-guides/extracting-insights-from-surveys.md)
- [Core Concepts](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/quickstart-guides/basics.md)
- [Android](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/sdk/android.md)
- [iOS](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/sdk/ios.md)
- [Web](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/sdk/web.md)
- [React Native](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/sdk/react-native.md)
- [Flutter](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/sdk/flutter.md)
- [Google Tag Manager](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/sdk/google-tag-manager.md)
- [Links](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/sdk/links.md)
- [API](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/sdk/api.md)
- [Mixpanel](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-sources/mixpanel.md): Product Analytics
- [CleverTap](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-sources/clevertap.md): Customer Engagement Platform
- [Segment](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-sources/segment.md): Customer Data Platform
- [Amplitude](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-sources/amplitude.md): Cohort Sync & Events Streaming
- [RudderStack](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-sources/rudderstack.md)
- [Backend Triggers](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-sources/backend-triggers.md)
- [Hightouch](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-sources/hightouch.md)
- [Amplitude](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-destinations/amplitude.md): Event Stream
- [CleverTap](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-destinations/clevertap.md)
- [Mixpanel](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-destinations/mixpanel.md)
- [Segment Streams](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-destinations/segment-streams.md): Push response data from Blitzllama to Segment.
- [Zapier](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-destinations/zapier.md)
- [Slack](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-destinations/slack.md)
- [Webhook](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-destinations/webhook.md)
- [Export APIs](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/connections-destinations/export-apis.md)
- [Team Members & Projects](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/organization/team-members-and-projects.md)
- [MTU Sampling](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/organization/mtu-sampling.md)
- [Zendesk](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/eureka-connections/zendesk.md)
- [Freshdesk](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/eureka-connections/freshdesk.md)
- [Intercom](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/eureka-connections/intercom.md)
- [Play Store](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/eureka-connections/play-store.md)
- [Appstore](https://documentation.blitzllama.com/eureka-connections/appstore.md)


---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://documentation.blitzllama.com/master.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
